name: clawgoal
description: ClawGoal Monorepo - UI and Backend Services

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @clawgoal/backend-claw build && pnpm --filter @clawgoal/ui build && pnpm --filter @clawgoal/backend build
scripts.build:packages:minify: pnpm --filter @clawgoal/backend-claw build && pnpm --filter @clawgoal/ui build && pnpm --filter @clawgoal/backend build:minify
